customBoundaries.name: core_contracts

customBoundaries.name: db_repositories
customBoundaries.reason: Drizzle repositories and schema; only data access layer in the system

customBoundaries.name: analyzers
customBoundaries.reason: Source-agnostic cost and waste analysis rules running over normalized data

customBoundaries.name: cli
customBoundaries.reason: CLI commands, argv parsing, and dynamic adapter loader

customBoundaries.name: adapter_warp
customBoundaries.reason: Warp adapter — ingests warp.sqlite into normalized traces/spans/messages

customBoundaries.name: adapter_openclaw
customBoundaries.reason: OpenClaw adapter — ingests JSONL session logs

customBoundaries.name: adapter_claude_code
customBoundaries.reason: Claude Code adapter — ingests ~/.claude/projects session logs

customBoundaries.name: api_lib
customBoundaries.reason: Aggregation helpers, DB lifecycle, response shaping for the API

customBoundaries.name: api_entry
customBoundaries.reason: API app bootstrap and route mounting

customBoundaries.name: web_pages
customBoundaries.reason: Top-level dashboard pages (Overview, Sessions, TraceDetail, Settings, Setup)

customBoundaries.name: web_components
customBoundaries.reason: Reusable UI components — charts, tables, layout

customBoundaries.name: web_api_client
customBoundaries.reason: Frontend HTTP client and response type contracts

customBoundaries.name: web_entry
customBoundaries.reason: Web app bootstrap and root component
